creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
According to the calendar[1] Boost 1.66 release is scheduled on 2017-12-13. However, we need bug 224185 fixed before deciding what to mark BROKEN. With not much time before 2018Q1 branches landing maybe delayed until 2018Q1 branches to avoid MFH churn.

[1] http://www.boost.org/development/index.html
